content:
Formatting
* Please study the formatting syntax on this page: https://www.codingame.com/playgrounds/40701/help-center/statement , and format your statement properly as described in the points below.

Goal
* Please format "S" and "K" as [[variables]].

* Please add "The resulting ASCII value is then converted back to a character." to the end.

Input
* Please format "S" and "K" as [[variables]].

* Please format "Line 1" and "Line 2" in <<bold>>.

Output
* Please format "Line 1" in <<bold>>.

Constraints
* Please format "S" and "K" as [[variables]].

* Please change "contains" to "contain", and then add "and the encrypted string" before "contain".

* Please add "only" after "characters".

Thanks.
